title: Agent host + colony runtime cancel timeout/noise lane precheck
delta_summary: timeout case is downgraded to debug-level signal with explicit message
non-timeout failures preserve warning-level logging with traceback

risk_signals.evidence: upstream merges timeout and failures into single warning path
risk_signals.impact: expected timeout windows can inflate warning logs

decision_gate: keep_local acceptable if cancellation semantics remain intact and host/runtime worker tests stay green
